meta.name: TemplateCraft Knowledge Base
meta.description: Structured documentation for TemplateCraft — an inference-based code generator that converts clean JSON Schema into Go Kart _template_builder and _page documents

overview.description: TemplateCraft is a deterministic, inference-based code generator for the Go Kart low-code framework. It takes a clean JSON Schema (from LiteSpec parseDSL(), no UI annotations) and generates complete _template_builder or _page MongoDB documents by inferring the best Wave CSS components, layout, and structure from schema types and constraints.
keyPrinciples: Schema describes data, the generator decides presentation — no UI annotations required
Inference-based — examines type, format, enum, pattern, $ref, and property names to choose controls
Deterministic — no LLM, no randomness, 100% predictable output
Dual target — generates both _template_builder (HTML) and _page (json_layout) documents
Nunjucks templates with custom delimiters avoid Pongo2 syntax conflicts
Shared inference layer — same control/layout decisions for both output formats

pipeline.description: TemplateCraft sits at the end of the LiteSpec → Go Kart pipeline
flow: 1. LiteSpec DSL → parseDSL() → Clean JSON Schema
4. Documents → POST to Go Kart API → MongoDB
5. Go Kart serves the templates/pages via routes

generate.description: Generate _template_builder documents from a JSON Schema

params.schema: Clean JSON Schema with properties, $defs, required, allOf, sort, breadcrumb
params.options.collectionName: MongoDB collection name (optional if schema.title is set)

generate.returns: Array of _template_builder document objects (typically 2: list + edit)

generatePages.description: Generate _page documents from a JSON Schema

params.schema: Same clean JSON Schema as generate()
params.options.collectionName: MongoDB collection name (optional if schema.title is set)

generatePages.returns: Array of _page document objects (typically 2: list + edit)

otherExports.generateListContent: Generate HTML content for a list template
otherExports.generateEditContent: Generate HTML content for an edit template
otherExports.generateEditCode: Generate Code tab JavaScript for edit (runGet, runPut, runPost, runDelete)
otherExports.generateListCode: Generate Code tab JavaScript for list (runList)
otherExports.generateFieldRules: Generate field rules object from allOf conditionals
otherExports.generateFieldRulesString: Generate field rules as JSON string
otherExports.generateEditForm: Generate edit form HTML from normalized properties
otherExports.generateEditPageLayout: Generate json_layout array for edit page
otherExports.generateListPageLayout: Generate json_layout array for list page
otherExports.createTemplateDocument: Create a _template_builder document with all fields
otherExports.createPageDocument: Create a _page document with all fields
otherExports.inferControl: Infer Wave CSS control from a schema property
otherExports.inferListCol: Infer list column configuration from a property
otherExports.normalizeProperties: Convert JSON Schema properties object to iterable array
otherExports.resolveRef: Resolve a $ref to its definition from $defs
otherExports.findArrayTypesFromSchema: Find primitive and non-primitive array fields

inference.description: The inference layer examines schema property characteristics to deterministically choose Wave CSS components and layout grouping. No UI annotations needed.

controlInference.description: Maps schema property types/constraints to Wave CSS components
controlInference.enumThreshold: Enums with <= 3 values render as radio buttons; > 3 as select dropdowns (template target only; pages always use wc-select)

layoutInference.description: Groups schema properties into responsive grid rows for form layout
groupingStrategy: 2. Known field pairs matched and grouped into rows
3. Remaining fields grouped by common underscore prefix
5. Objects with $ref become fieldsets with recursive layout
6. Arrays of objects become fieldset-cards with recursive sub-layout

listColumnInference.description: Determines list/table column configuration from property types

rules.result: plain string column with header filter
tickCross formatter with tristate header filter

templateBuilder.description: Generates _template_builder documents with hand-written HTML content
templateBuilder.contextVariables: Template.RoutePrefix, Template.Slug, Template.RouteNextTemplateSlug, Template.RoutePrevTemplateSlug, Template.Schema, Template.CollectionName

generatedParts.content: Full Pongo2 HTML — extends __template_name__, block pageContent, wc-article-skeleton, breadcrumb, wc-form, inferred controls, wc-save-split-button, wc-hotkey, meta_fields include
generatedParts.code: runGet (CreateNew or FindByID), runPut/runPost (SaveAndValidate with array detection), runDelete (DeleteByID), runList (empty records array)
generatedParts.field_rules: JSON from allOf conditionals — visible, required, clearWhenHidden rules

page.description: Generates _page documents with json_layout for wc-page-designer
page.jsonLayoutField: json_layout — JSON array of layout element nodes
page.jsonSchemaField: json_schema — input schema stringified (loaded from schema selection)
page.contextVariables: Page.RoutePrefix, Page.Slug, Page.RouteNextPageSlug, Page.RoutePrevPageSlug, Page.Schema, Screen.CollectionName, Screen.Schema

generatedParts.json_layout: JSON array — column wrapper, wc-breadcrumb, wc-tab/wc-tab-item (General + Change Log), rows with inferred controls, fieldsets for nested objects, data-array/data-item for arrays
generatedParts.json_schema: Input schema passed through as JSON string
generatedParts.code: Same as _template_builder — runGet, runPut, runPost, runDelete, runList

jsonLayoutStructure.description: The json_layout is a tree of element nodes consumed by wc-page-designer and rendered by Go Kart's GenerateHTMLFromSchemaAndLayout()

commonProperties.data-id: Unique identifier for each element (random string)
commonProperties.type: Element type — determines rendering and available properties
commonProperties.label: Display label
commonProperties.scope: JSON pointer to schema property for data binding
commonProperties.rules: Array of reactive rule definitions (SHOW, COPY, ENABLE, etc.)

scopeFormat.empty: For layout containers, tabs, decorative elements

layout.column: Vertical flex container — css typically 'flex-1 px-10 py-2'
layout.row: Horizontal flex container for grouping controls
layout.fieldset: Grouped section with legend label — css typically 'flex flex-col p-4 gap-4 border border-solid rounded-md primary-bg-border-color'

formControls.wc-input: Text input — properties: label, scope, css, minlength, maxlength, placeholder, is_readonly, is_disabled, is_required
formControls.wc-input-email: Email input — same properties as wc-input
formControls.wc-input-tel: Phone input — same properties as wc-input
formControls.wc-input-date: Date input — properties: label, scope, css, min, max, is_readonly, is_disabled, is_required
formControls.wc-input-number: Number input — properties: label, scope, css, min, max, step, is_readonly, is_disabled, is_required
formControls.wc-input-currency: Currency input — same properties as wc-input-number
formControls.wc-input-checkbox: Checkbox/toggle — properties: label, scope, css, is_toggle, is_readonly, is_disabled, is_required
formControls.wc-select: Dropdown select — properties: label, scope, css, is_readonly, is_disabled, is_required; children: wc-option elements
formControls.wc-select-multiple: Multi-select with chip mode — properties: label, scope, css, mode, is_readonly, is_disabled, allow_dynamic
formControls.wc-select-lookup: Select populated from a lookup — properties: label, scope, lookupName, lookupCSS
formControls.wc-select-collection: Select populated from a collection — properties: label, scope, collName, collDisplayMember, collValueMember
formControls.wc-textarea: Multi-line text — properties: label, scope, css, placeholder, rows, is_readonly, is_disabled, is_required
formControls.wc-code-mirror: Code editor — properties: name, theme, mode, height, has_line_numbers, value

arrayHandling.data-array: Container for repeating items — properties: scope, css, has_add_new; css typically 'card-host flex flex-wrap gap-4'
arrayHandling.data-item: Individual array item card — css typically 'card-item flex flex-col p-4 gap-4 xw-300 border border-solid rounded-md primary-border-color card relative primary-bg-image-gradient'

tabs.wc-tab: Tab container — css typically 'col-1 mt-2 mb-4'
tabs.wc-tab-item: Individual tab panel — properties: label, css (first tab gets 'active p-4')

table.wc-tabulator: Data table — properties: ajax_url, pagination, pagination_size, layout, filter_mode, sort_mode, header_visible, movable_columns, selectable_rows, etc.
table.wc-tabulator-column: Table column — properties: field, title, formatter, formatter_params, header_filter, header_filter_func, visible, width, hoz_align, cell_click, etc.
table.wc-tabulator-func: Custom table function — properties: name, value (onInit, onDelete, onClone)

buttons.wc-save-split-button: Save with Save & New / Save & Return dropdown — properties: saveUrl, saveNewUrl, saveReturnUrl, positionArea
buttons.wc-save-button: Simple save button — properties: label, saveUrl

utility.wc-option: Select option child — properties: label, value

rules.description: Reactive rules attached to elements that define inter-element behavior

effects.COPY: Copy source value directly to target
effects.COPY-TOLOWER: Copy source value, convert to lowercase
effects.COPY-TOLOWER-UNDERSCORE: Copy source value, convert to lowercase with underscores replacing spaces
effects.SHOW: Show target element when condition is met
effects.HIDE: Hide target element when condition is met
effects.ENABLE: Enable target element when condition is met
effects.DISABLE: Disable target element when condition is met
effects.REQUIRE: Make target required when condition is met
effects.UN-REQUIRE: Make target optional when condition is met

nunjucksTemplates.description: HTML content for _template_builder is rendered via Nunjucks templates with custom delimiters to avoid Pongo2 conflicts

customDelimiters.pongo2BlockTags: {% %} — passes through as literal Pongo2 output
customDelimiters.pongo2VariableTags: {{ }} — passes through as literal Pongo2 output

customFilters.proper: Converts snake_case to Proper Case (e.g., 'first_name' → 'First Name')

inputSchemaFormat.description: TemplateCraft accepts a clean JSON Schema produced by LiteSpec parseDSL() without UI annotations

requiredFields.properties: Object of property name → property schema
requiredFields.title: Used to derive collectionName if not explicitly provided (optional)

optionalFields.allOf: Conditional validation rules (if/then) — used to generate field_rules
optionalFields.sort: Default sort order array: [{ name, dir }]

propertySchema.type: string, integer, number, boolean, object, array
propertySchema.anyOf: LiteSpec nullable date-time pattern: [{ type, format }, { type, enum: [''] }]

files.src/index.js: Main entry — generate(), generatePages(), createTemplateDocument(), createPageDocument(), exports
files.src/template-engine.js: Nunjucks environment with custom delimiters, render(), registerTemplate()
files.src/inference/infer-control.js: Schema property → Wave CSS component inference
files.src/inference/infer-layout.js: Property grouping into grid rows, fieldsets, fieldset-cards
files.src/generators/edit-form.js: Recursive form HTML generation using inference + layout
files.src/generators/code-tab.js: Server-side JavaScript code generation (runGet, runPut, runPost, runDelete, runList)
files.src/generators/field-rules.js: Field rules from allOf conditionals (visible, required, clearWhenHidden)
files.src/layouts/wrappers.js: Card and tab-control layout wrappers for templates
files.src/templates/register.js: Imports and registers all .njk template files

buildAndTest.build: npm run build — produces dist/template-craft.js (IIFE) and dist/template-craft.min.js

goKart.description: Low-code enterprise framework — consumes _template_builder and _page documents

waveCss.description: Web component library — wc-input, wc-select, wc-tabulator, wc-page-designer, etc.

liteSpec.description: DSL compiler — produces the clean JSON Schema that TemplateCraft consumes
